steps.title: Find the constant a using the given data
Calculate breaking strength for x = 7.50 inches
steps.content:
Substitute $a = 1.4$ and $x = 7.50$ into the equation:

$$y = 900(1.4)(7.50)^2$$

Calculate $(7.50)^2 = 56.25$ and $900 \times 1.4 = 1,260$:
$$y = 1,260 \times 56.25 = 70,875$$

The estimated breaking strength is 70,875 pounds.
